artPrompt: A trembling hand re-flipping a tarnished gold coin under a candle's glow while ashen-robed onlookers lean in, the coin caught spinning in cold gold light, drifting ash and guttering flame, the clock tower edging toward midnight in blood-dark haze behind, the obsessive dread of an endless recount rendered with tender solemn stillness, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Final Recount
text:
Choose a die roll or coin flip from this turn — anyone's — and demand a recount. Reroll or reflip it. Then put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each time it has now been recounted (this game).
Prophecy (As this resolves, predict the new result out loud.) If you predicted the recount correctly, you draw two cards and the recount is certified in your favor.
flavorText: "We will recount until the numbers confess."
